texto: The failure of India's public institutions to keep pace with the dramatic political, economic and social transformations under way has led to severe gaps in governance. The end result of this disjuncture has been a proliferation of grand corruption - a malaise made up of a diverse array of regulatory, extractive, and political rent-seeking activities.
explicacao: Citação de Milan Vaishnav sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The failure of India's public institutions to keep pace with the dramatic political, economic and…” articula reflexao, corruption, india em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.

frase_original: The failure of India's public institutions to keep pace with the dramatic political, economic and social transformations under way has led to severe gaps in governance. The end result of this disjuncture has been a proliferation of grand corruption - a malaise made up of a diverse array of regulatory, extractive, and political rent-seeking activities.
